_comment: This file was generated automatically by Supernova.io and should not be changed manually. To modify the format or content of this file, please contact your design system team.

text-weak-granite-color-text-weak.description: Text weak. Use: labels, read-only text

text-hint-granite-color-text-hint.description: Text hint. Use: field hint, search hint, password hint

inactive-granite-color-background-inacti.description: Background inactive. Use: Toggle switch in inactive state, inactive UI elements

active-granite-color-background-active.description: Background Active. Use: indicate active tab or page, active selection checkbox or radio button, Primary button

active-hover-granite-color-background-ac.description: Background Active Hover or Strong Hover. Use: hover over Primary button, command dropdown menu, active Tab, active navigator entry.

active-pressed-granite-color-background-.description: Background active pressed. Renamed from active selected. Use: on mouse press button

inverse-granite-color-background-inverse.description: Background inverse. Dark bg in light theme.

bg-highlight-granite-color-background-hi.description: Background Highlight. Use: to highlight text. e.g. filter match, selected text to be edited
